Create the following design task in the `JCoFb` nodes.

  Task:
  Implement the Export Modal screen (node JCoFb) from HarmonyForge.pen into the Next.js codebase at /Users/shivpat/harmony-forge-redesign. The file to update is src/components/organisms/ExportModal.tsx. Read the existing file first, then read the design node JCoFb at depth 6 to get full structure. The modal has: a header-only shell (HarmonyForge wordmark, no step bar), a dim overlay over the background, and a two-panel modal (ExportModal node MXjyB: 1200x700, cornerRadius 8, drop shadow). Left pane (sLLGl: 480px, $sonata-bg bg, $sonata-detail right border): score preview with actual music notation lines. Right pane (xvJFD: 720px, $neutral-50 bg): 'Export As' title (Fraunces 22px), subtitle 'Choose a format below', format grid with PDF (active/selected, $sonata-surface fill), MIDI, MusicXML, Finale, PNG, JSON, Audio, PDF options in a 2x4 grid, plus an 'Export PDF' CTA button ($sonata-accent, bottom right). Token mapping: $sonata-bg=var(--sonata-bg), $sonata-surface=var(--sonata-surface), $sonata-detail=var(--sonata-detail), $sonata-accent=var(--sonata-accent), $neutral-50=var(--neutral-50), $text-on-light=var(--text-on-light). Fonts: Fraunces=font-brand class, IBM Plex Mono=font-mono class. Use Tailwind v4 with var(--token) syntax. Build must pass with: source ~/.zshrc && node ./node_modules/.bin/next build

     1→import { motion } from 'framer-motion'
     2→import { Download, X } from 'lucide-react'
     3→
     4→interface Props {
     5→  onClose: () => void
     6→}
     7→
     8→export function ExportModal({ onClose }: Props) {
     9→  return (
    10→    <div className="fixed inset-0 z-50 flex items-center justify-center pointer-events-none">
    11→      <motion.div 
    12→        className="absolute inset-0 bg-black/40 backdrop-blur-sm pointer-events-auto"
    13→        initial={{ opacity: 0 }}
    14→        animate={{ opacity: 1 }}
    15→        exit={{ opacity: 0 }}
    16→        onClick={onClose}
    17→      />
    18→      
    19→      <motion.div 
    20→        className="w-[1200px] h-[700px] bg-(--hf-bg) rounded-xl shadow-[0_24px_64px_rgba(0,0,0,0.3)] border border-(--hf-detail) flex overflow-hidden pointer-events-auto relative"
    21→        initial={{ opacity: 0, scale: 0.96 }}
    22→        animate={{ opacity: 1, scale: 1 }}
    23→        exit={{ opacity: 0, scale: 0.96 }}
    24→        transition={{ type: 'spring', damping: 25, stiffness: 300 }}
    25→      >
    26→        {/* Left Pane: Preview */}
    27→        <div className="w-[480px] h-full bg-(--hf-surface) border-r border-(--hf-detail) flex flex-col p-8">
    28→          <div className="flex-1 flex items-center justify-center">
    29→            {/* Thumbnail Mock */}
    30→            <div className="w-[340px] h-[480px] bg-white rounded-md shadow-sm border border-neutral-200 flex flex-col p-4 opacity-80 pointer-events-none">
    31→              <div className="w-1/2 h-1 bg-neutral-300 mx-auto mb-4" />
    32→              <div className="w-1/4 h-1 bg-neutral-300 mx-auto mb-12" />
    33→              {[...Array(6)].map((_, i) => (
    34→                <div key={i} className="w-full h-8 border-y border-neutral-200 mb-6 flex flex-col justify-between py-1">
    35→                  <div className="w-full h-px bg-neutral-200" />
    36→                  <div className="w-full h-px bg-neutral-200" />
    37→                  <div className="w-full h-px bg-neutral-200" />
    38→                </div>
    39→              ))}
    40→            </div>
    41→          </div>
    42→          <div className="h-16 flex items-center justify-center border-t border-(--hf-detail) pt-4">
    43→            <span className="text-sm text-(--hf-text-secondary)">Previewing Page 1 of 4</span>
    44→          </div>
    45→        </div>
    46→
    47→        {/* Right Pane: Controls */}
    48→        <div className="flex-1 h-full flex flex-col p-10 relative">
    49→          <button 
    50→            onClick={onClose}
    51→            className="absolute top-6 right-6 p-2 rounded-full hover:bg-(--hf-surface) text-(--hf-text-secondary) transition-colors"
    52→          >
    53→            <X className="w-5 h-5" />
    54→          </button>
    55→          
    56→          <h2 className="font-brand text-[38px] text-(--hf-text-primary) mb-8">Export As</h2>
    57→          
    58→          <div className="grid grid-cols-4 grid-rows-2 w-full h-[320px] gap-4 mb-auto">
    59→            {/* Top Row */}
    60→            <FormatCard active title="PDF" sub="Scores & Parts" bg="bg-red-50" border="border-red-200" darkBg="dark:bg-red-900/20" darkBorder="dark:border-red-800" />
    61→            <FormatCard title="MIDI" sub="Playback Data" border="border-(--hf-detail)" />
    62→            <FormatCard title="MusicXML" sub="Uncompressed" border="border-(--hf-detail)" />
    63→            <FormatCard title="MusicXML" sub="Compressed MXL" border="border-(--hf-detail)" />
    64→            {/* Bottom Row */}
    65→            <FormatCard title="PNG" sub="12 Images" border="border-(--hf-detail)" />
    66→            <FormatCard title="JSON" sub="Raw AST Flow" border="border-(--hf-detail)" />
    67→            <FormatCard title="Audio" sub="WAV / MP3" border="border-(--hf-detail)" />
    68→            <FormatCard title="ZIP" sub="Project Bundle" border="border-(--hf-detail)" />
    69→          </div>
    70→
    71→          <div className="w-full flex justify-end gap-4 border-t border-(--hf-detail) pt-6 mt-8">
    72→            <button 
    73→              onClick={onClose}
    74→              className="px-6 py-2.5 text-sm font-medium text-(--hf-text-secondary) hover:bg-(--hf-surface) rounded-md transition-colors"
    75→            >
    76→              Cancel
    77→            </button>
    78→            <button 
    79→              className="px-6 py-2.5 bg-(--hf-accent) text-black rounded-md font-semibold flex items-center gap-2 hover:brightness-110 transition-all active:scale-95"
    80→              onClick={onClose}
    81→            >
    82→              <Download className="w-4 h-4" /> Export PDF
    83→            </button>
    84→          </div>
    85→        </div>
    86→      </motion.div>
    87→    </div>
    88→  )
    89→}
    90→
    91→function FormatCard({ active, title, sub, bg = 'bg-(--hf-surface)', border, darkBg, darkBorder }: any) {
    92→  return (
    93→    <button className={`w-full h-full rounded-xl border-2 flex flex-col items-center justify-center gap-2 transition-all hover:-translate-y-1 hover:shadow-lg ${active ? `${bg} ${border} ${darkBg || ''} ${darkBorder || ''}` : `border-transparent bg-(--hf-surface) hover:border-(--hf-detail)`}`}>
    94→      <span className={`text-xl font-semibold tracking-tight ${active ? 'text-(--hf-text-primary)' : 'text-(--hf-text-secondary)'}`}>{title}</span>
    95→      <span className="text-[11px] font-mono text-(--hf-text-secondary) uppercase tracking-wider">{sub}</span>
    96→    </button>
    97→  )
    98→}
    99→
